title: gentianella quinquefolia var. occidentalis
intro: Gentianella quinquefolia var. occidentalis, also known as western cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the gentian family and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of gentianella quinquefolia var. occidentalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
